description: PJTL / Ride YourWay launch-readiness KPIs, gate rules, and shared formulas. Used by the viability engine and ML training labels.

readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Fleet time is productively used versus available capacity.
readiness_metrics.formula: Utilization = productive vehicle time divided by available time (see operating workbook definitions).

readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Billable activity exceeds a baseline (contract mix favors billable no-show protection).
readiness_metrics.formula: Ratio of billed-to-available utilization versus internal baseline.

readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Demand and filler volume support healthy schedule density.
readiness_metrics.formula: Volume pool index versus planned capacity (overbooking / broker mix).

readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Pricing and mix support revenue per standardized trip unit.
readiness_metrics.formula: Revenue divided by Kent-Leg count; Kent-Legs from trip miles using kent_leg constants in this file.

readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Enough Stretcher Alternative and SecureCare share to support premium economics.
readiness_metrics.formula: Share of trips that are high-acuity modes (stretcher, securecare).

readiness_metrics.business_meaning: No-show exposure that cannot be billed stays under control.
readiness_metrics.formula: Non-billable no-shows divided by applicable denominator (operating definition).

readiness_metrics.display_name: Road hours per vehicle per day
readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Vehicles are on the road long enough to cover demand.
readiness_metrics.formula: Total road hours divided by vehicle-days.

readiness_metrics.target_phrase: no single contract above 20% of volume or revenue
readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Revenue and volume are not over-dependent on one payer.
readiness_metrics.formula: Training row uses a single concentration index; live engine compares max(volume%, revenue%) per contract.

readiness_metrics.business_meaning: Unit cost of operation stays within the margin model.
readiness_metrics.formula: Fully loaded cost divided by road hours.

north_star.business_meaning: North-star profitability beyond the nine binary gates.
